_presets_note: Default ~300M params: fits T4 (16GB) comfortably with fp16. To scale up edit the fields above. ~1B preset: hidden_size=2048, intermediate_size=5632, num_hidden_layers=22, num_attention_heads=16, num_key_value_heads=8 (set use_8bit_optimizer=true in train_config and keep micro_batch_size small). ~3B preset: hidden_size=2560, intermediate_size=6912, num_hidden_layers=32, num_attention_heads=20, num_key_value_heads=4 (3B is the upper bound for T4 and requires 8-bit optimizer + gradient checkpointing + micro_batch_size=1).
